code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = tokens.get(i)
    match tok
    when Some(t)
      let n = string.parse_int(t)
      match n
      when Some(num)
        result = list.push(result, num)
      when None
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    let elem = a.get(i)
    match elem
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ val: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut found = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    let elem = xs.get(i)
    match elem
    when Some(x)
      if not found and x == val
        found = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut remaining = xs
  while remaining.len() > 0
    let m = list.min(remaining)
    match m
    when Some(min_val)
      result = list.push(result, min_val)
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, min_val)
    when None
      remaining = []
    end
  end
  result
end

fn format_result(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  if xs.len() == 0
    "empty"
  else
    mut s = ""
    mut i = 0
    while i < xs.len()
      let elem = xs.get(i)
      match elem
      when Some(x)
        if i == 0
          s = "#{x}"
        else
          s = "#{s} #{x}"
        end
      when None
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    s
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = io.read_line()
  let line2 = io.read_line()

  let l1 = match line1
  when Some(l)
    parse_line(l)
  when None
    []
  end

  let l2 = match line2
  when Some(l)
    parse_line(l)
  when None
    []
  end

  let inter = intersect(l1, l2)
  let sorted = sort_list(inter)
  let output = format_result(sorted)
  print(output)
end
